description: Thats the first search engine i found where documents are first class citizens. Results and the GPT summaries are great. The embedded document viewer is very comfortable. Using it for 2 months now. Overall, big thumbs up
author: Anat M.
pros: - Accurate results answer compared to others- answer is highlighted inside documents- supports PDFs DOC and PPTs- Easy to use
cons: - Would love more control over features - like number of results to show etc- Has portal building features that we dont really need- PPT presentation has issues sometimes with the fonts
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Impressive product that our company sees a lot of future value in.
author: Leroy G.
pros: The product is great, but I really appreciate the Korra team taking time to understand what we want to accomplish with the product.
cons: There seems to be a lot of trial and error at the early stages. However, any issues that we have had, or concerns are addressed very quickly.

description: Positive, thank you Korra team for all your hard work.
author: Cheryl B.
pros: AI integration, chat GPT-like responses, ability to upload multiple media types, that Korra will search within videos.
cons: We've just launched so cannot comment at this time.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Develop a KB in days, not months
description: You always worry with an early startup whether they can deliver service and a working product. Korra has. They stay in touch and they are active partners in our use case.
author: Jason B.
pros: Fast and easy. The latest wave of generative AI gives opportunities for rapid development by just dumping documents and videos. Korra does not require systematically adding "articles" the KB. For an organization like ours without a KB and knowledge in various documents, this is ideal. Development of an organizational wide KB took less than a week of collecting documents and adding them to Korra.
cons: Korra is a startup and a new product. As you might expect, some features common in KM/KB systems were not quite there. Korra is an AI tool looking to become a KM/KB tool, not an existing tool that added AI features. Missing are common KM workflows and processes to ensure information and documents are fresh. This is a next phase of development and didn't hurt our pilot, but it would be a problem in the long-run if these deficits are not addressed.
author_profession: Director of Operations, Center for Online and Extended Learning
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Impressed with the product from the get-go. Highly recommend
author: Yoel B.
pros: In addition to the ease in setting it up, the intuitive way we "publish" additional content the most impressive feature is the end-user interface: simple intuitive and comprehensive
cons: Still does not natively index GSuite documents unless saved in a non-native format (PDF, Word etc.)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Korra has transformed ThetaRay’s approach to information management and collaboration. By streamlining access to accurate, up-to-date data and offering flexible, tailored solutions, Korra has empowered ThetaRay to save time, reduce errors, and scale its operations efficiently.
author: Yaron L.
pros: Korra has brought structure to our ocean of data and files. It’s not just about finding answers, but understanding the source of those answers. The ability to customize experiences for various departments has truly been transformative.
cons: Nothing specific for now. there were few small things that Korra solved during the implementation.

review_title: Knowledge Management Generative AI You Can Trust
description: A lot of AI software promises the world and is just another shiny object. This really works and there are clear use cases like customer service, knowledge management, help desk and making complex PDF manuals searchable and accessible. This AI software does what it promises very well.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: My company is a video production platform that specializes in reviews and other scale use cases for standardized videos. We tested Korra’s advanced video search technology on a library of our videos and found it was extraordinarily effective at presenting relevant results for specific questions. No complex integrations were required. The setup took less than five minutes.
cons: I haven't encountered any immediate shortcomings. They don't promise a magic AI solution to every problem but what they do they do exceedingly well.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Very good in every way. As said before, [sensitive content hidden] has been outstanding and we are very thankful!
author: Wilmer F.
pros: The fact that they helped us in every step and were there for any questions. In some cases, companies deliver their product and expect the customer to handle it all by themselves. But not in the case of Korra!
cons: I do not know. From both a technical perspective and a customer support perspective they have been super helpful.

review_title: A must have for any customer facing product
author: Alison H.
pros: Korra is easy to implement, extremely useful for customers, and they have the best team there to help me with any questions I have along the way. It is an invaluable tool for us, greatly reducing the number of times customers reach out to us and increasing customer satisfaction.
cons: I have nothing bad to say. I am extremely satisfied with the product.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Get to specific, relevant information... even in the middle of a video!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Love the way you can get directly to specific, relevant information including the exact location within a video as well as the exact location within a large document!
cons: Looking forward to the additional features being developed!
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Korra changes the Knowledge base Paradigm
description: The guys at Korra have gone above and beyond to help make our experience world-class. I have even expanded our capacity to capture all of our research articles internally to help our staff keep on top of our Research and Development.
author: Jeremy B.
pros: The ease of use for our users to go from our platform and immediately be able to ask questions they are looking for. Clean and simple interface and is easy to use. The most critical is providing the best answer to their question almost every time.
cons: There isn't much I don't like least about Korra.

review_title: Review from a product manager standpoint
author: Alona R.
pros: It uses AI to fetch the most relevant information I need instead of finding it myself
cons: A few UI tweaks can improve the User experience is some of the modules.

review_title: Takes the search out of search
description: Overall experience with Korra has been great. I've seen the product rapidly mature and improve, and I anticipate that process to contiue.
author: Jim M.
pros: The ease of setup to create a live search tool is fantastic. In less that 10 minutes, I was up and running with a series of video, pdf and document based content. Upload was a snap and accuracy with excellent.
cons: I'd love more customization on the setup of the Korra search page. Working in sales, I often turn to this tool to demonstrate client content effectiveness. Creating quick demos is key. Having more functionality in visual layout would be great.

author: Tal C.
pros: The fact that you don't need to do anything other than publish your material and start asking questions in the search bar. There is no manipulation of data that is required, which is very unique.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Surprisingly good, super fast, super friendly and great support
author: Adi S.
pros: Korra Is very intuitive. Setting it up took a few minutes, and setting aside the time it took the system to analyse my corpus, time to value was minimal.
cons: The way results are presented could be optimized.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Eliav S.
pros: The smart NLP-based search, and the fact that no proprietary data is sent to external cloud environments.

description: With Korra's assistance, I am able to obtain valuable insights into the user experience of my product, identify areas that require attention, and maintain a high level of customer satisfaction with minimal manpower support.
author: Hadar A.
pros: We appreciate the instant answers of Korra.
cons: Not at the moment, the team is very responsive to all our requests.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
